name: Molded Cheese Treats (Wilton)
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely grate the cheese.
2. Place the grated cheese in a micro-proof measuring cup.
3. Microwave on medium power until the cheese is melted, approximately 2 minutes.
4. Pour the melted cheese into Wilton candy molds of your choice (Halloween ones are awesome).
5. If desired, insert sticks for lollipops.
6. Refrigerate for 15 to 20 minutes until set.
7. Remove from the mold by gently flexing it.
8. Keep refrigerated until served.
